subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath come with the truth and manifested Himself as He willeth, that all may know that He, verily, hath power over all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی اتی بالحق و اظهر نفسه کیف اراد لیعلمن الکل انه لهو المقتدر علی ما
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @justice and wrath of God
